ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "sku" INTEGER /* SKU number of the product */,
  "type" INTEGER /* ID of the product type */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Average rating of the product */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Unique handle or identifier for the product URL */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* List of ingredients of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently available */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date the product was launched */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product information */,
  "auto_include" TEXT /* Indicates if the product is auto-included in user recommendations */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user who reviewed the product */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product type image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concerns" (
  "concern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concern */,
  "concern_name" TEXT /* Name of the concern */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the concern */,
  "solution" TEXT /* Brief solution or recommendation for the concern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_concerns" (
  "product_concern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-concern relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "concern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the concern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_concern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_concerns_concern_id FOREIGN KEY ("concern_id") REFERENCES concerns ("concern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_concerns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review not helpful */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review was written by a verified purchaser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "age_range" INTEGER /* ID of the age range */,
  "skin_type" INTEGER /* ID of the skin type */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* ID of the gender */,
  "sensitivity" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has sensitive skin */,
  "concerns" TEXT /* Specific skin concerns of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* Referrer code or source of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_age_range FOREIGN KEY ("age_range") REFERENCES age_ranges ("age_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_skin_type FOREIGN KEY ("skin_type") REFERENCES skin_types ("skin_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_ranges" (
  "age_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age range */,
  "age_range_name" TEXT /* Name of the age range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skin_types" (
  "skin_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skin type */,
  "skin_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the skin type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skin_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_concerns" (
  "user_concern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-concern relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "concern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the concern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_concern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_concerns_concern_id FOREIGN KEY ("concern_id") REFERENCES concerns ("concern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_concerns_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "auto_include" TEXT /* Indicates if the user wants products auto-included in recommendations */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user wants email notifications */,
  "preferred_brands" TEXT /* User's preferred brands */,
  "preferred_categories" TEXT /* User's preferred product categories */,
  "preferred_ingredients" TEXT /* User's preferred ingredients */,
  "avoided_ingredients" TEXT /* Ingredients the user wants to avoid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended product */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the recommendation was made */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the recommendation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the purchase */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique order ID */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
